requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — Lighting Radio Disturbance (SONCAP on NIS CISPR 15 / IEC 60598 EMC)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 发射——照明无线电骚扰（SONCAP，依 NIS CISPR 15 / IEC 60598 EMC）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 發射——照明無線電騷擾（SONCAP，依 NIS CISPR 15 / IEC 60598 EMC）

summary.en: LED luminaires imported into Nigeria are assessed for radio-disturbance (EMC emissions) under SONCAP using the Nigerian Industrial Standard adopting CISPR 15 (NIS CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), which is the international basis for lighting-equipment emissions. The assessment covers conducted emissions on the mains terminals (150 kHz–30 MHz) and radiated emissions. Emissions evidence forms part of the test-report package supporting the SONCAP Product Certificate; a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate is then required before vessel loading for port clearance. Testing must be performed by a SON-recognised laboratory to the standard edition accepted by SON, with products evaluated on the Nigerian 230 V / 50 Hz mains. Luminaires with wireless functionality additionally fall under NCC type approval (see ledng-emc-02 / smart-lighting note).
summary.zh: 进口至尼日利亚的 LED 灯具在 SONCAP 下，依据采用 CISPR 15 的尼日利亚工业标准（NIS CISPR 15——电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法）进行无线电骚扰（EMC 发射）评估——CISPR 15 为照明设备发射的国际基础。评估涵盖电源端传导发射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及辐射发射。发射证据构成支持 SONCAP 产品证书的检测报告组成部分；随后须就每批货物在装船前取得 SONCAP 证书以供港口清关。检测须由 SON 认可实验室按 SON 接受的标准版本进行，产品在尼日利亚 230 V / 50 Hz 电源上评估。具备无线功能的灯具还须取得 NCC 型号核准（见 ledng-emc-02 / 智能照明说明）。
summary.zht: 進口至奈及利亞的 LED 燈具在 SONCAP 下，依據採用 CISPR 15 的奈及利亞工業標準（NIS CISPR 15——電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法）進行無線電騷擾（EMC 發射）評估——CISPR 15 為照明設備發射的國際基礎。評估涵蓋電源端傳導發射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及輻射發射。發射證據構成支持 SONCAP 產品證書的檢測報告組成部分；隨後須就每批貨物在裝船前取得 SONCAP 證書以供港口清關。檢測須由 SON 認可實驗室按 SON 接受的標準版本進行，產品在奈及利亞 230 V / 50 Hz 電源上評估。具備無線功能的燈具還須取得 NCC 型號核准（見 ledng-emc-02 / 智能照明說明）。

standards_or_laws: NIS CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (Nigerian Industrial Standard adopting CISPR 15)
SONCAP — Product Certificate + per-shipment SONCAP Certificate (EMC emissions evidence forms part of the PC test package)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification for relevant product categories, with testing at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories. Because both NIS CISPR 15 and GB 17743 derive from CISPR 15, the emission limits are largely the same. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are not recognised under the Nigerian SONCAP conformity pathway.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具，相关产品类别须符合 GB 17743，作为 CCC 认证的组成部分，检测在 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。由于 NIS CISPR 15 与 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，发射限值基本相同。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告不被尼日利亚 SONCAP 合格评定路径所认可。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具，相關產品類別須符合 GB 17743，作為 CCC 認證的組成部分，檢測在 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。由於 NIS CISPR 15 與 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，發射限值基本相同。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告不被奈及利亞 SONCAP 合格評定路徑所認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: NIS CISPR 15 and GB 17743 are both CISPR 15-derived, so emission limits are largely the same and a product that genuinely meets GB 17743 is technically close to NIS requirements. The gap is procedural: (1) the EMC emissions evidence must be packaged into the SONCAP Product Certificate dossier — a CCC EMC report alone does not satisfy SONCAP; (2) a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate must be obtained before vessel loading; (3) testing must be to the SON-accepted standard edition by a SON-recognised laboratory (Chinese CNAS labs may be acceptable where SON-recognised — confirm the lab's SONCAP scope); (4) the product is evaluated on 230 V / 50 Hz rather than 220 V. Note that, unlike the EU, Nigeria's emissions requirement is delivered through the SONCAP conformity package rather than a self-declared CE-style DoC.
gap.zh: NIS CISPR 15 与 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，故发射限值基本相同，真正符合 GB 17743 的产品在技术上接近 NIS 要求。差距在程序：（1）EMC 发射证据须纳入 SONCAP 产品证书档案——仅有 CCC EMC 报告不满足 SONCAP；（2）须就每批货物在装船前取得 SONCAP 证书；（3）检测须按 SON 接受的标准版本、由 SON 认可实验室进行（中国 CNAS 实验室在获 SON 认可时可被接受——须确认实验室的 SONCAP 范围）；（4）产品在 230 V / 50 Hz 而非 220 V 上评估。注意：与欧盟不同，尼日利亚的发射要求通过 SONCAP 合格评定档案交付，而非自我声明的 CE 式 DoC。
gap.zht: NIS CISPR 15 與 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，故發射限值基本相同，真正符合 GB 17743 的產品在技術上接近 NIS 要求。差距在程序：（1）EMC 發射證據須納入 SONCAP 產品證書檔案——僅有 CCC EMC 報告不滿足 SONCAP；（2）須就每批貨物在裝船前取得 SONCAP 證書；（3）檢測須按 SON 接受的標準版本、由 SON 認可實驗室進行（中國 CNAS 實驗室在獲 SON 認可時可被接受——須確認實驗室的 SONCAP 範圍）；（4）產品在 230 V / 50 Hz 而非 220 V 上評估。注意：與歐盟不同，奈及利亞的發射要求透過 SONCAP 合格評定檔案交付，而非自我聲明的 CE 式 DoC。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — lighting radio-disturbance (EMC emissions) evidence to NIS CISPR 15 required as part of the SONCAP Product Certificate; per-shipment SONCAP Certificate required for clearance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaire EMC emissions for Nigeria are assessed under SONCAP against NIS CISPR 15 and packaged into the Product Certificate dossier, with a per-shipment SONCAP Certificate required before clearance. Emission limits are largely harmonized with China's CISPR 15-derived GB 17743, so the technical re-test burden is limited, but CCC EMC reports do not satisfy SONCAP: evidence must be to the SON-accepted edition by a SON-recognised lab and evaluated on 230 V / 50 Hz. The binding difference from the EU is procedural — emissions clear through the SONCAP package, not a self-declared DoC.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼日利亚的 LED 灯具 EMC 发射在 SONCAP 下依据 NIS CISPR 15 评估，并纳入产品证书档案，清关前须取得每批货物 SONCAP 证书。发射限值与中国源自 CISPR 15 的 GB 17743 基本协调，故技术重测负担有限，但 CCC EMC 报告不满足 SONCAP：证据须按 SON 接受版本、由 SON 认可实验室出具，并在 230 V / 50 Hz 上评估。与欧盟的关键差异在程序——发射通过 SONCAP 档案清关，而非自我声明 DoC。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 奈及利亞的 LED 燈具 EMC 發射在 SONCAP 下依據 NIS CISPR 15 評估，並納入產品證書檔案，清關前須取得每批貨物 SONCAP 證書。發射限值與中國源自 CISPR 15 的 GB 17743 基本協調，故技術重測負擔有限，但 CCC EMC 報告不滿足 SONCAP：證據須按 SON 接受版本、由 SON 認可實驗室出具，並在 230 V / 50 Hz 上評估。與歐盟的關鍵差異在程序——發射透過 SONCAP 檔案清關，而非自我聲明 DoC。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity + NCC Type Approval for Smart / Wireless Luminaires
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 抗扰度 + 智能/无线灯具的 NCC 型号核准
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 抗擾度 + 智能/無線燈具的 NCC 型號核准

summary.en: Beyond emissions, lighting-equipment EMC immunity in Nigeria is referenced to the Nigerian Industrial Standard adopting IEC 61547 (NIS IEC 61547 — Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements), covering ESD, fast transient/burst, surge, conducted RF, magnetic field, and voltage dips/interruptions; immunity evidence supports the SONCAP Product Certificate. Separately and critically, any luminaire with wireless functionality (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee or other radio) is a telecommunications/radio device and requires type approval from the Nigerian Communications Commission (NCC) before it can be imported and sold — this is a distinct mandatory approval running in parallel with SONCAP. NCC type approval requires submission of radio test reports (commonly to ETSI/IEC RF standards), product details, and an application through the NCC type-approval process; the approved equipment is listed and may need NCC marking. SONCAP clears the luminaire as an electrical product; NCC clears the radio module.
summary.zh: 除发射外，尼日利亚的照明设备 EMC 抗扰度参照采用 IEC 61547 的尼日利亚工业标准（NIS IEC 61547——一般照明设备——EMC 抗扰度要求），涵盖静电放电、电快速瞬变/脉冲群、浪涌、传导射频、磁场及电压暂降/中断；抗扰度证据支持 SONCAP 产品证书。另外且关键的是，任何具备无线功能（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 或其他无线电）的灯具属于电信/无线电设备，在进口及销售前须取得尼日利亚通信委员会（NCC）型号核准——这是与 SONCAP 并行的独立强制核准。NCC 型号核准须提交无线电检测报告（通常按 ETSI/IEC 射频标准）、产品资料，并通过 NCC 型号核准流程申请；获批设备会被列册，并可能须加 NCC 标志。SONCAP 将灯具作为电气产品放行；NCC 放行无线电模块。
summary.zht: 除發射外，奈及利亞的照明設備 EMC 抗擾度參照採用 IEC 61547 的奈及利亞工業標準（NIS IEC 61547——一般照明設備——EMC 抗擾度要求），涵蓋靜電放電、電快速瞬變/脈衝群、浪湧、傳導射頻、磁場及電壓暫降/中斷；抗擾度證據支持 SONCAP 產品證書。另外且關鍵的是，任何具備無線功能（Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 或其他無線電）的燈具屬於電信/無線電設備，在進口及銷售前須取得奈及利亞通信委員會（NCC）型號核准——這是與 SONCAP 並行的獨立強制核准。NCC 型號核准須提交無線電檢測報告（通常按 ETSI/IEC 射頻標準）、產品資料，並透過 NCC 型號核准流程申請；獲批設備會被列冊，並可能須加 NCC 標誌。SONCAP 將燈具作為電氣產品放行；NCC 放行無線電模組。

standards_or_laws: NIS IEC 61547 — Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements (Nigerian Industrial Standard adopting IEC 61547)
NCC Type Approval — Nigerian Communications Commission type approval for radio/telecom equipment (required for wireless-enabled smart luminaires)

summary.en: China's immunity equivalent is GB/T 18595-2014 (General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment), technically equivalent to IEC 61547 and a recommended (GB/T) standard, less strictly enforced than the emissions standard GB 17743. For wireless-enabled luminaires sold in China, SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval is the parallel radio approval — analogous in function to Nigeria's NCC type approval, but a separate national scheme with no mutual recognition. CCC focuses primarily on safety and emissions; immunity is not universally enforced. Chinese SRRC approval does not substitute for NCC approval.
summary.zh: 中国抗扰度对应标准为 GB/T 18595-2014（照明设备的电磁抗扰度要求），技术上等同于 IEC 61547，为推荐性（GB/T）标准，执行力度弱于发射标准 GB 17743。在中国销售的无线灯具，国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）型号核准为并行的无线电核准——功能上类似尼日利亚的 NCC 型号核准，但为独立的国家方案，无互认。CCC 主要侧重安全和发射；抗扰度并非普遍执行。中国 SRRC 核准不可替代 NCC 核准。
summary.zht: 中國抗擾度對應標準為 GB/T 18595-2014（照明設備的電磁抗擾度要求），技術上等同於 IEC 61547，為推薦性（GB/T）標準，執行力度弱於發射標準 GB 17743。在中國銷售的無線燈具，國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）型號核准為並行的無線電核准——功能上類似奈及利亞的 NCC 型號核准，但為獨立的國家方案，無互認。CCC 主要側重安全和發射；抗擾度並非普遍執行。中國 SRRC 核准不可替代 NCC 核准。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18595-2014 — General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment (SAC/SAMR — recommended, IEC 61547 base)
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation Commission approval for wireless-enabled equipment in China

gap.en: Two distinct gaps. (1) Immunity: NIS IEC 61547 and CN GB/T 18595 share the IEC 61547 base, so a product tested to GB/T 18595 is technically close, but immunity evidence must be packaged into the SONCAP Product Certificate and CN immunity testing is recommended-only and may be missing from the CCC dossier. (2) Radio approval: a smart luminaire with any wireless function must obtain NCC type approval before import — this is mandatory, separate from SONCAP, and has no equivalence with China's SRRC approval (no mutual recognition). The exporter must run two parallel tracks for a smart luminaire: SONCAP (electrical safety + EMC) and NCC type approval (radio). NCC requires RF test reports, product documentation, and an application; build NCC lead time in alongside SONCAP. A purely passive (non-wireless) LED luminaire needs SONCAP only and no NCC approval.
gap.zh: 存在两项差距。（1）抗扰度：NIS IEC 61547 与中国 GB/T 18595 共享 IEC 61547 基础，故按 GB/T 18595 测试的产品技术上接近，但抗扰度证据须纳入 SONCAP 产品证书，且中国抗扰度测试仅为推荐性，可能不在 CCC 档案中。（2）无线电核准：具备任何无线功能的智能灯具在进口前须取得 NCC 型号核准——此为强制、独立于 SONCAP，且与中国 SRRC 核准无对等（无互认）。出口商就智能灯具须并行两条线：SONCAP（电气安全 + EMC）与 NCC 型号核准（无线电）。NCC 须提交射频检测报告、产品文件及申请；须在 SONCAP 之外预留 NCC 前置时间。纯被动（非无线）LED 灯具仅需 SONCAP，无需 NCC 核准。
gap.zht: 存在兩項差距。（1）抗擾度：NIS IEC 61547 與中國 GB/T 18595 共享 IEC 61547 基礎，故按 GB/T 18595 測試的產品技術上接近，但抗擾度證據須納入 SONCAP 產品證書，且中國抗擾度測試僅為推薦性，可能不在 CCC 檔案中。（2）無線電核准：具備任何無線功能的智能燈具在進口前須取得 NCC 型號核准——此為強制、獨立於 SONCAP，且與中國 SRRC 核准無對等（無互認）。出口商就智能燈具須並行兩條線：SONCAP（電氣安全 + EMC）與 NCC 型號核准（無線電）。NCC 須提交射頻檢測報告、產品文件及申請；須在 SONCAP 之外預留 NCC 前置時間。純被動（非無線）LED 燈具僅需 SONCAP，無需 NCC 核准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC immunity evidence (NIS IEC 61547) supports the SONCAP Product Certificate; NCC type approval additionally mandatory for any wireless-enabled smart luminaire before import
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (immunity) — GB/T 18595-2014 is a recommended standard; SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless-enabled equipment in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Nigeria, lighting EMC immunity is referenced to NIS IEC 61547 and supports the SONCAP Product Certificate — largely harmonized with China's IEC 61547-based GB/T 18595, though CN immunity is recommended-only and may be absent from the CCC dossier. Critically, any wireless-enabled smart luminaire additionally requires NCC type approval before import — a mandatory radio approval separate from SONCAP and not satisfied by China's SRRC approval. Run SONCAP and NCC type approval as two parallel tracks for smart luminaires; passive luminaires need SONCAP only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 就尼日利亚而言，照明 EMC 抗扰度参照 NIS IEC 61547 并支持 SONCAP 产品证书——与中国基于 IEC 61547 的 GB/T 18595 基本协调，但中国抗扰度仅为推荐性且可能不在 CCC 档案中。关键是，任何无线智能灯具在进口前还须取得 NCC 型号核准——这是独立于 SONCAP 的强制无线电核准，且不被中国 SRRC 核准满足。智能灯具须并行 SONCAP 与 NCC 型号核准两条线；被动灯具仅需 SONCAP。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 就奈及利亞而言，照明 EMC 抗擾度參照 NIS IEC 61547 並支持 SONCAP 產品證書——與中國基於 IEC 61547 的 GB/T 18595 基本協調，但中國抗擾度僅為推薦性且可能不在 CCC 檔案中。關鍵是，任何無線智能燈具在進口前還須取得 NCC 型號核准——這是獨立於 SONCAP 的強制無線電核准，且不被中國 SRRC 核准滿足。智能燈具須並行 SONCAP 與 NCC 型號核准兩條線；被動燈具僅需 SONCAP。
